summary: Tested three competitive features for trucking GPS app: 1) Speed Warning System with configurable tolerance, 2) Facility Ratings & Reviews with 5-star system, 3) Min Rating Filter in MapControls. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend features verified except Min Rating Filter which has a positioning issue where MapControls are outside viewport in driving mode.

ui_bugs.issue: Map controls positioned outside viewport (y=-249.75) in driving mode, making filter menu inaccessible

action_items: Fix MapControls positioning in driving mode - controls are positioned at y=-249.75 (above viewport)
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Speed Warning toggle in Display tab with Siren icon (data-testid='hud-toggle-showSpeedWarning')
VERIFIED: Speed Warning Tolerance control with +0/+3/+5/+8/+10 options (data-testid='speed-warning-tolerance')
VERIFIED: 21/21 visible count in Display tab
VERIFIED: POI Detail Modal shows Driver Reviews section (data-testid='facility-ratings-section')
VERIFIED: Review tags (Clean Restrooms, Safe Parking, etc.) working
VERIFIED: Submit rating with review text and tags works
VERIFIED: 'Thanks for your review!' confirmation appears after submission
VERIFIED: GET /api/facility-ratings?poiId=xxx returns JSON with averageRating/totalReviews/ratings
VERIFIED: POST /api/facility-ratings creates a review successfully
VERIFIED: Along Route POI cards show star ratings (Pilot Flying J shows ★ 4.0)
VERIFIED: Route Comparison panel shows PRIMARY, ALT 1, ALT 2 routes with time/distance/fuel cost
VERIFIED: Driving mode shows all HUD elements (arrival bar, fuel cost, HOS, along route POIs, compass rose, weather)
CODE REVIEW: Min Rating Filter implemented correctly in MapControls.tsx (lines 211-237) with data-testid='min-rating-filter'
CODE REVIEW: Speed Warning System implemented in NavigationView.tsx (lines 1000-1058) with Web Audio API beeps
CODE REVIEW: Facility Ratings API endpoints in server.ts (lines 583-665) using file-based JSON store

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

seed_data_creation: Created test rating for POI 'test_poi_123' with 4-star rating, review 'Great truck stop!', tags ['Clean Restrooms', 'Safe Parking']
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features tested: 1) Speed Warning System - toggle and tolerance control verified in Display tab. 2) Facility Ratings - full flow tested including star rating, tags, review text, submit, and confirmation. Ratings now show on Along Route POI cards (Pilot Flying J shows ★ 4.0). 3) Min Rating Filter - code is correct but MapControls are positioned outside viewport in driving mode (y=-249.75). Backend APIs all working. Test flow: Guest Login -> Navigation -> Search 'Dallas TX' -> Route Comparison appears -> Click Close -> Driving mode with all HUD elements. Click on POI in Along Route list to see rating form.

speed_warning_toggle.details: Speed Warning toggle found in Display tab with Siren icon, text 'Flash red + audio alert when exceeding speed limit'

speed_warning_tolerance.details: Tolerance control shows +0, +3, +5 (default), +8, +10 options with data-testid='speed-tolerance-{val}'

display_tab_count.details: 21/21 visible count confirmed in Display tab

facility_ratings_section.details: Driver Reviews section found in POI Detail Modal with data-testid='facility-ratings-section'

review_submission.details: 4-star rating with review text and tags submitted successfully, 'Thanks for your review!' confirmation appeared

api_post_rating.details: POST /api/facility-ratings creates review and returns {success: true, averageRating: 4, totalReviews: 1}

api_batch_ratings.details: POST /api/facility-ratings-batch returns ratings for multiple POIs

min_rating_filter.details: Code implemented correctly with data-testid='min-rating-filter' and ALL/1+/2+/3+/4+ buttons, but MapControls positioned outside viewport in driving mode

route_comparison_panel.details: Route Comparison panel shows PRIMARY, ALT 1, ALT 2 routes with time, distance, fuel cost

driving_mode_hud.details: All HUD elements visible: arrival bar, fuel cost, HOS, along route POIs, compass rose, weather, speed limit sign, navigation HUD

poi_ratings_on_cards.details: Pilot Flying J shows ★ 4.0 rating on Along Route POI card
